title: PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST - 211info
text: PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Private physician practice and healthcare clinic offering pediatric services. Includes childhood immunizations, well-child visits, breastfeeding support, behavioral health, sports injury prevention and treatment, and general pediatric care. 2701 NW Vaughn Street Suite 360 Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, Saturdays/Sundays/holidays by appointment Email (503) 227-0671 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 227-0671 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule appointment. Same day appointments may be available for very sick children. FEES: Accepts OHP. Does not offer sliding scale fees but uninsured patients may receive a 25% discount for visit if paid at time of service. Children's immunizations are free; however, there is a $15 administration fee. Complimentary "get acquainted" visit with pediatrician. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday/Sunday/Holiday 8am-noon by appointment Services: Childhood Immunization Pediatrics Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - LACTATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST
